Wild Companion Expend a Wild Shape use or spell slot to cast Find Familiar. Familiar is Fey. Disappears on Long Rest.

Assign to Abilities
Magical Overrides
Override Cap raises the 20 cap for additive bonuses (e.g. an item granting +2 WIS beyond 20). Hard Set forces an ability to a fixed value, ignoring all other calculations (e.g. Belt of Giant Strength).
